title: Thai-Style Stir-Fried Cabbage with Sweetheart Lettuce
description: A quick and simple Thai-inspired stir-fry made with crunchy cabbage, sweet sweetheart lettuce, and crispy fried shallots.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the thinly sliced cabbage and chopped sweetheart lettuce and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Add the crispy fried shallots and stir-fry for another minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and sugar, and pour the sauce over the vegetables.
Stir-fry for another minute, until the vegetables are well coated with the sauce.
Serve the stir-fried cabbage and sweetheart lettuce hot, garnished with additional crispy fried shallots if desired.
